top_signals.title: Gold and Silver Rise on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Fed Strategy
top_signals.summary: Gold and silver rose on dip-buying, as traders monitored Middle East tensions for signs that higher energy costs could stoke inflation, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to tighten policy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump threatens to reignite trade war with fresh 50% tariffs on Canada
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: petrol prices climb back above $4 a gallon, and Trump’s fundraising Super Pac rakes in more than any other
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Short Sellers Ramp Up Bets Against HelloFresh’s Debut Bond
top_signals.summary: Bets against HelloFresh SE’s debut bond, issued only three weeks ago, have surged after its trading got off to a rocky start earlier this month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations
top_signals.summary: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations

top_signals.title: Colombia, Peru Send Early Policy Signs to Extend Election Rally
top_signals.summary: Investors are finding fresh reasons to buy Colombian and Peruvian assets as the countries’ newly elected presidents deliver early signals that their market-friendly agendas will translate into policy overhaul.

top_signals.title: Wall Street is selling more rental homes, as buying ban takes effect
top_signals.summary: The largest landlords are all net sellers year-to-date, with 3,180 more homes sold than bought since Jan. 1.

top_signals.title: A brief history of time: Bremont’s new Stephen Hawking watch
top_signals.summary: A new watch celebrating the legacy of Stephen Hawking could be a black hole for your bank account but a great leap for your wrist Four years have elapsed since the original MoonSwatch was released, kickstarting a global phenomena that has seen collectors queuing for days outside retailers in a bid to get their hands on [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol Midnight on Base to expand onchain credit markets
top_signals.summary: Morpho has launched Midnight, a fixed-rate, fixed-term lending protocol on Base that complements its existing variable-rate lending protocol.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
